emails.subject: COU's
emails.body: COU's Rajesh, I left a message with Dan Rogers regarding the availability of a COU in draft form. I have a hard copy of a COU that I believe came from OLNG. I can fax it to you tomorrow. Is your fax still 91-22-2881793? Regards, Paul

emails.subject: Re: COU's
emails.body: Re: COU's Paul My current fax no. are 91 22 653 4049/61. Rajesh Paul Y'Barbo@ENRON 05/01/2001 04:57 AM

emails.subject: COU's
emails.body: COU's Rajesh, Have you been able to get a draft COU agreement from Clay? How is your move coming? Paul
